name: Highly Purified Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection 2000 IU
about: Highly Purified Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection 2000 IU is a liquid injection that is used for fertility treatment. It is sourced from India and is offered by exporters, suppliers, and traders. The injection comes in a dosage of 2000 IU, and the dosage guidelines should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. It is recommended to store the injection in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness. This injection contains hormones that are responsible for stimulating ovulation and fertility in women. It is also used to treat hypogonadism in men. The highly purified chorionic gonadotrophin injection is an effective treatment for infertility, and it has been used for many years with positive results.
